covid_surveillance.short_description: Weekly covid surveillance data from Arizona Department of Health Services
covid_surveillance.long_description: Arizona Department of Health Services collects and reports covid surveillance data weekly. Data covers emergency department visits, hospitalizations, laboratory-confirmed cases, and/or percent positivity.

influenza_surveillance.short_description: Weekly influenza surveillance data from Arizona Department of Health Services
influenza_surveillance.long_description: Arizona Department of Health Services collects and reports influenza surveillance data weekly. Data covers emergency department visits, hospitalizations, laboratory-confirmed cases, and/or percent positivity.

az_dph.name: Arizona Department of Health Services
az_dph.description: Arizona Department of Health Services provides weekly respiratory surveillance data for Arizona covering pathogens including: covid, influenza, rsv, ari, ili . Data is published via state health department dashboards and reports. Temporal coverage: ~2019-ongoing. Geographic coverage: state level.
az_dph.restrictions: Public domain state government health data.
